currencyBehaviorCard.title: Currency Behavior
currencyBehaviorCard.description: Configure how prices are sourced and converted in this price list.

isExchangeRateDerived.label: Exchange Rate Derived
isExchangeRateDerived.description: When enabled, prices are automatically converted from the source currency using current exchange rates.

sourceCurrencyCode.label: Source Currency
sourceCurrencyCode.description: The currency in which original prices are defined before conversion.

roundingRule.label: Rounding Rule
roundingRule.description: How converted prices are rounded after exchange rate calculation.

isSourceLocked.label: Source Locked
isSourceLocked.description: When enabled, prices are managed by an external system and cannot be edited manually in the Prices tab.

form.sourceLockedWarning: This price list is locked. Prices are managed by {sourceSystem} and cannot be modified here.
form.sourceLockedWarningInternal: This price list is locked. Prices cannot be edited manually.
form.derivedPricingInfo: Prices in this list are automatically converted from {sourceCurrency} to {defaultCurrency}. Exchange rates are applied at write-time.

domains.title: Connected Domains
domains.subtitle: Manage the domains and addresses connected to this store.
domains.empty: No domains connected yet. Connect a domain to make your storefront live.
domains.pendingBanner: Your storefront needs a domain to go live. Connect a domain to get started.
domains.pendingSetupDescription: Domain setup was started but not completed.
domains.ingressRequired: Domain connection requires ingress configuration. Please set up your platform ingress settings first.
domains.deleteBindingConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect this hostname? The storefront will no longer be reachable at this address.
domains.deleteDomainSpaceConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this domain? All host bindings under this domain will also be removed.

wizard.title: Connect a Domain
wizard.subtitle: Follow the steps below to connect a domain to your store.

step1.title: What address should your store use?
step1.description: Enter the domain or subdomain where customers will visit your store.
step1.singleStoreDescription: Each subdomain will be verified individually.
step1.multiStore: Use this domain for multiple stores
step1.multiStoreDescription: New subdomains will be activated automatically after initial setup.
step1.wwwSuggestion: You're connecting {entered}. You may also want to connect {suggested} so visitors can reach your store from both addresses.
step1.wwwSuggestionHint: You can set this up after completing the current connection.

step2.title: Verify you own {domain}
step2.description: Add the following DNS record at your domain provider to prove ownership.
step2.verifyFailed: Ownership could not be verified yet.
step2.retryHint: DNS changes can take up to 48 hours to propagate. You can try again later.

step3.title: Point {hostname} to your store
step3.description: Add the following DNS records at your domain provider to connect your domain.
step3.wildcardInstructions: Add these DNS records for wildcard routing
step3.verifyFailed: Connection could not be verified yet.
step3.retryHint: DNS changes can take up to 48 hours to propagate. You can try again later.

step4.title: Domain connected!
step4.wwwSuggestion: Visitors might also try {hostname}. Connect it to make sure they can reach your store.

empty.title: No stores yet
empty.description: Create your first store to start selling. Stores represent your sales channels — each with its own locale, currency, and storefront.

card.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this store? This action cannot be undone.

notifications.genericError: The request could not be completed.

installation.title: Platform Installation
installation.description: Define the admin host and public ingress targets that all DNS instructions will use.

ask.title: TLS Ask Endpoint
ask.description: Use this token in your static Caddy ask configuration. The host parameter is provided by Caddy at request time.
ask.empty: Save the installation first to generate or persist a TLS ask token.

tlsAskSecret.label: TLS Ask Secret
tlsAskSecret.placeholder: Leave empty to keep the current secret or generate a new one
tlsAskSecret.description: Caddy uses this secret when calling the ask endpoint before issuing a certificate.

canonicalTargetHost.label: Canonical Target Host
canonicalTargetHost.description: Preferred CNAME target for subdomains and wildcard onboarding.

ipv4Addresses.label: IPv4 Addresses
ipv4Addresses.description: One IP per line. Used to generate apex A records.

ipv6Addresses.label: IPv6 Addresses
ipv6Addresses.description: One IP per line. Used to generate apex AAAA records.

domainSpaces.title: Domain Spaces
domainSpaces.description: Claim a base domain such as helixstore.com, generate DNS instructions, and verify onboarding status.
domainSpaces.empty: No domain space has been created yet.

storeSettings.title: Store Settings
storeSettings.description: Update the selected store while keeping storefront activation tied to host bindings.
storeSettings.noStore: Create a store before binding storefront hosts.

hostBindings.title: Store Host Bindings
hostBindings.description: Bind exact hostnames to the selected store. DNS instructions always point back to the installation ingress.

hostBindings.noStore: Select or create a store to manage host bindings.
